B

baseUri() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
baseUri() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Returns the base URI for the dataset, particularly useful when building Linked Data representations of the dataset's metadata

D

Dataset - Class in ie.isde.metadata
Implements the Dataset Interface to create objects of the Dataset type to represent metadata objects of this type within the Irish Spatial Data Exchange.
Dataset() - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
dateIssued() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
dateIssued() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
 

F

fileIdentifier() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
fileIdentifier() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Return the file identifier extracted from the metadata record as a String, or null if not initialised.
fromISO(String) - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
fromISO(String) - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Populates an object's attributes from an ISO XML record

I

id - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.Keyword
A com.aventrix.jnanoid.jnanoid.NanoIdUtils identifier assigned at the time of object instantiation
id - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection
 
IDataset - Interface in ie.isde.metadata
Represents the metadata object describing a dataset in the Irish Spatial Data Exchange
identifierToFileName() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
identifierToFileName() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Returns the identifier of the record as a file system safe string for saving the record to disk, minus the file extension
ie.isde.exceptions - package ie.isde.exceptions
Provides custom Exceptions for more explicit error handling in Irish Spatial Data Exchange software tools.
ie.isde.metadata - package ie.isde.metadata
Represents the base metadata objects in use across the Irish Spatial Data Exchange
ie.isde.metadata.translator - package ie.isde.metadata.translator
 
IsoXmlQueries - Enum in ie.isde.metadata
Enumerates the XPath queries used to extract the various metadata attributes used in a constructing a Dataset object

K

Keyword - Class in ie.isde.metadata
 
Keyword(Document) - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.Keyword
 
keyword - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection
 
keywordCollecionUrl - Variable in enum ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollectionHandlingRules
The URL to this KeywordCollection as a String
keywordCollection() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
KeywordCollection - Class in ie.isde.metadata
 
KeywordCollection(Document) - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection
Create a KeywordCollection object from a org.w3c.dom.Document object containing a single ISO 19139 MD_KEYWORDS block
KeywordCollectionHandlingRules - Enum in ie.isde.metadata
A number of KeywordCollections should be used for more specialised purposes, including ThemeCollections and VariableMeasuredCollections.
keywordCollectionName - Variable in enum ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollectionHandlingRules
The lexical name of this KeywordCollection as a String

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
Translates an ISO XML record from the Irish Spatial Data Exchange to either World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Data Catalog Vocabulary (DCAT) profile as Terse Triple Language (TTL) or Schema.org as a JSON object conforming to the JSON-LD Linked Data profile.
Metadata - Interface in ie.isde.metadata
This interface is used for all base metadata entity types within the Irish Spatial Data Exchange system
metadataAbstract() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
metadataAbstract() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Get the abstract (describing the who, what, when, where and why) of the dataset

N

NotEnoughInputsException - Class in ie.isde.exceptions
 
NotEnoughInputsException() - Constructor for class ie.isde.exceptions.NotEnoughInputsException
 
ns() - Method in enum ie.isde.metadata.RDFNamespaces
Get the preferred namespace prefix for the vocabulary
nsURI() - Method in enum ie.isde.metadata.RDFNamespaces
Get the preferred namespace URI for the vocabulary

P

preferredLabel - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.Keyword
The preferred lexical label for the Keyword

R

RDFNamespaces - Enum in ie.isde.metadata
Enumerates the RDF namespaces required for the translated Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata
rule - Variable in enum ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollectionHandlingRules
The handling rule for this KeywordCollection as a String.

T

theme - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
ThemeCollection - Class in ie.isde.metadata
ThemeCollection extends KeywordCollection to give high level dataset themes for the dataset.
ThemeCollection(Document) - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.ThemeCollection
 
title() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
title() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Returns the title of the dataset represented by the metadata object
title - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection
 
toDCAT() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
toDCAT() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.Metadata
Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a W3C Data Catalog Vocabulary representation
TooManyInputsException - Class in ie.isde.exceptions
 
TooManyInputsException() - Constructor for class ie.isde.exceptions.TooManyInputsException
 
toSchemaOrg() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
toSchemaOrg() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.Metadata
Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a Schema.org representation
toString() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
toString() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection
 
Translator - Class in ie.isde.metadata.translator
This class facilitates different serializations of Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata.
Translator() - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
 

U

url - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.Keyword
A URL to a definition of the Keyword in a controlled vocabulary
url - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollection

values() - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.IsoXmlQueries
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.KeywordCollectionHandlingRules
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.RDFNamespaces
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
variableMeasured - Variable in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
VariableMeasuredCollection - Class in ie.isde.metadata
VariableMeasuredCollection extends KeywordCollection to allow differentiation of Keywords which are explicitly linked to descriptions of the variables measured in the dataset.
VariableMeasuredCollection(Document) - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.VariableMeasuredCollection
 

X
